Off Calendar Sep-15-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-07-2021 Continued To Aug-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James O'Neill, via ZOOM, for Carol Weitz, Administrator.

The court begins by querying counsel regarding the status of this matter. Counsel reports that the death of one of the beneficiaries has caused a delay in administration. The court directs counsel to respond to the Examiner's notes. Counsel advises that he is prepared to reply.

The Accounting Petition is continued to August 18, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
